decomposition.rationale: Bounded refinement of US-0020 subscription-ops: transaction-first explorer + rich filters + manual activate is one vertical slice with shared API/UI confirm path.
alternatives_considered: BUG on US-0020 — rejected (US-0020 AC-1 met shipped contract; gap is scope expansion not defect)

boundaries.US-0021: Transaction ledger search + filters (account, category, Geldbereich, payee, date, recurring hint) + manual subscription activate; extends DEC-0099 confirm
boundaries.US-0020: Unchanged tags, majority category, existing Discover recurrence-candidate mode may coexist or merge at architecture
